project.name: Watchmen 监控页面重设计
project.designRead: Data monitoring dashboard / data engineers & ops teams / calm professional trust / high density / avoid generic AI gradient hero, avoid neon glow
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Enterprise data monitoring SaaS, cool neutral light + indigo accent, Inter + JetBrains Mono, restrained surfaces with border-first depth, high information density for daily ops workflows.

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: Light theme: indigo primary (#4F46E5) with 5 tints, slate-50 background, white surfaces, slate-200 borders. Status: green/orange/red/blue semantic only. No extra brand hues.
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: Radius: sm=4px, md=8px, lg=12px, full=9999px. Cards use 8px radius, buttons 6px, inputs 6px, pills full.
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter (sans) for all UI text, JetBrains Mono for identifiers/trace IDs/enum values/table names. H1=28px/700, H2=20px/600, H3=16px/600, body=14px/400, caption=11px/500/uppercase/wide.
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 4px base unit. Page padding 24px, section gap 20px, card padding 16-20px, tight data rows 8-12px vertical.
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: Border-first cards with subtle shadow-xs. Status pills with dot + label. Progress meters as thin bars. KPI tiles with large numeric + label + optional delta. Mono text for all identifiers.
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: Static surfaces use border + shadow-xs (alpha 0.04). Floating layers (dropdowns, modals, popovers) use shadow-md/lg. No colored shadows, no glow.
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: Lucide-style line icons (1.5px stroke). No photographs. Data visualization uses recharts-style area/bar charts with brand tints.
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: Subtle hover backgrounds (slate-50), selected state uses indigo-50 ring. No bounce, no scale transform on static elements. Live indicator uses pulsing green dot.

sharedProjectShellContract.navStructure: Left sidebar: logo header (gradient indigo icon + app title + env badge), nav group with 7 items (Overview, Ingestion, Pipeline, Topics, Alerts disabled, Global Map disabled, Settings disabled), live status footer with pulsing green dot.
sharedProjectShellContract.topbarPattern: Sticky top bar: sidebar trigger + page title/subtitle on left; global search input + time range segmented control (1h/24h/7d/30d) + refresh button + language toggle + avatar + logout on right.
sharedProjectShellContract.mainFrame: Flex-1 main area with gradient bg-slate-50, 24px padding, overflow-auto.
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: Primary: indigo bg, white text, 6px radius, 32-36px height. Secondary: white bg, slate-200 border. Ghost: transparent, hover slate-50.
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRhythm: All rows align to 4px grid. Section headers align left. KPI numbers are right-aligned tabular-nums. Status pills and badges use center alignment within their containers.

privateRegions: selected log detail with DAG tree

pages.title: 采集监控 — 事件追踪
pages.visualNorthStar: A monitoring cockpit where a data engineer instantly sees which ingestion events are running, which succeeded, and which failed — with a live event timeline on the left and a per-table drill-down on the right. The page should feel like an air traffic control radar for data pipelines.
continuityAnchors: Light theme with indigo primary and slate surfaces
Inter for UI text, JetBrains Mono for identifiers and data values
Status pills with dot + label (green/orange/red/blue/neutral tones)
Left sidebar + topbar shared shell with active nav highlighting

scenario.goal: 实时追踪数据采集进度，快速定位卡住或失败的事件，下钻查看分表处理详情
scenario.flow: 查看事件概览 → 发现 EXECUTING 状态事件 → 点击查看分表结果 → 确认 JSON 处理进度 → 定位失败表

pages.title: 管道监控 — 执行诊断
pages.visualNorthStar: A diagnostic workbench where an ops engineer filters pipeline logs by error status, inspects a collapsible DAG execution tree (stages → units → actions), reads error messages inline, and triggers a rerun — all without leaving the page. Think of it as a flight recorder for pipeline executions.
continuityAnchors: Light theme with indigo primary and slate surfaces
Inter for UI text, JetBrains Mono for identifiers and data values
Status pills with dot + label (green/orange/red/blue/neutral tones)
Left sidebar + topbar shared shell with active nav highlighting

scenario.goal: 排查管道执行失败，查看 DAG 执行树定位异常节点，一键重跑失败管道
scenario.flow: 筛选 ERROR 状态日志 → 查看执行 DAG 树 → 展开 ERROR 节点查看错误信息 → 查看 old/new 值差异 → 点击重跑
